descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes beat Red Deer Rustlers 9-1 in Centennial Cup Western semi-final game seven.
descriptionLong: Dave Tomlinson scored three goals as the visiting Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Red Deer Rustlers 9-1 in game seven of the Centennial Cup Western semi-final on Thursday. Richmond erupted for five goals in the second period after a scoreless first. The Sockeyes advance to face the Humboldt Broncos in the Western best-of-seven final, with the opening game Monday in Humboldt.

attribution.headline: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Red Deer Rustlers in Centennial Cup Western semi-final
